Grid.TextBlock:
1. (기밀) 상황: After intense combat operations in June, negotiations have been ongoing between NATO and the WP. However, a recent breakdown has seen a powerful USSR SAG get underway steaming towards the GIUK Gap with the intent to breakout. The USS Eisenhower battle group, reinforced by Standing NATO Maritime Group One, has been tasked to locate and destroy the SAG to drive the WP back to the negotiating table.
2. (기밀) 목표: 2.1 Locate and destroy the USSR SAG.
3. (기밀) 실행: 3.1 EMCON policy at your discretion. 3.2 Once enemy SAG is located, destroy using any means.
4. (기밀) 적 전투서열: 4.1 키로프 수상전단 4.1.1 1x 키로프 4.1.2 1x 슬라바 4.1.3 1x 소브레멘니 4.1.4 1x 크레스타 4.1.5 1x 우달로이 4.2 Suspected AGI trawlers in the area 4.3 Soviet Naval Aviation (may sortie in support) 4.4 Kosmos 1932 RORSAT will pass over at 0028Z, USAF attempting shootdown
5. (기밀) 아군 전투서열: 5.1 TF 65.7 (아이젠하워 전투단) 5.1.1 USS 드와이트 D. 아이젠하워 CVN-69 5.1.2 USS 뉴 저지 BB-62 5.1.3 USS 밸리 포지 CG-50 5.1.4 USS 데일 CG-19 5.1.5 FGS 몰더스 D-186 5.1.6 USS 렌츠 FFG-46 5.1.7 USS 토마스 C. 하트 FF-1092 5.1.8 HNoMS 스타방에르 F303
6. (기밀) INTEL ASSESSMENT: 6.1 Assess with medium confidence that USSR attack submarines will be escorting the KIROV SAG. 6.2 Assess with high confidence that USSR aircraft will support the KIROV SAG. 6.3 Assess with high confidence that weather is clearing up in the next 2 hours.
